case_title: CARLOS GONZALEZ VS. LAUREN BARKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT BARKER, LAUREN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-10-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-24-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-14-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100113912)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-24-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-02-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
